name: co-dialectic
description: Co-Dialectic v4.13.0 - teachme + tiered sharpening. Protocol 3 now shows three tiers per turn: IMPROVED (specificity) -> SOCRATIC (questioning) -> DIALECTIC (Plato thesis-antithesis-synthesis). New teachme skill explains the last sharpening, deep-dives on techniques, and surfaces growth reports. growth.jsonl telemetry is xOS-hydration-compatible.
